name: Meadows

movements.notes: slow, from inverted hang, straight body and arms

description: A rings-only chipper of ascending volume — muscle-ups, slow ring lowers, ring handstand push-ups, ring rows, and ring push-ups — testing a full range of gymnastics-ring strength.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/meadows (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09
